title: UX Standards & Patterns
description: Unified UI/UX patterns: toast notifications, tooltips, breadcrumbs, form validation, confirm dialogs

toast.description: Non-blocking notification for action feedback (save, error, success)
toast.spec: src/components/Toast.tsx - portal-based, auto-dismiss (3s info, 5s error), stack multiple. Types: success/green, error/red, info/blue, warning/yellow. Renders at bottom-right via fixed positioning.
toast.usage: Use on all mutations (save formation, buy item, battle complete, settings save, sign out). Import { toast } from a toast store or hook.

tooltip.description: Contextual help on hover/focus for icons, labels, settings toggles
tooltip.spec: src/components/Tooltip.tsx - CSS-only or simple div with onMouseEnter/Leave. Shows after 500ms delay. Position: top by default with arrow.
tooltip.usage: Settings descriptions (Reduced Motion, Low Quality), field constraints (min/max length), icon meanings. Wrap <Tooltip text="..."><button/></Tooltip>.

breadcrumbs.description: Navigation path showing current location with links to parents
breadcrumbs.spec: Simple <Breadcrumbs items={[{label, href}]} /> component. Home > Game > Battle. Last item is current page (no link). Separator: / or >
breadcrumbs.usage: Every game page (battle, army, mining, td, castle, shop, mail, inventory, settings). Help user navigate back without browser back.

form_validation.description: Inline validation feedback showing constraints and errors on fields
form_validation.spec: Each input shows: (1) placeholder hint with constraints, (2) clear button (X) when value present, (3) error message below on invalid, (4) character counter for text fields with maxLength. Validation runs on blur AND on submit.

email.message: Must be a valid email address

confirm_dialog.description: Inline or modal confirmation for destructive actions
confirm_dialog.spec: Two options: (1) Inline expansion (as in Settings > Sign Out) for simple confirms. (2) Modal overlay for destructive actions (delete account, reset progress). Shows action description + Yes/Cancel.
confirm_dialog.usage: Sign out, unequip item, remove from formation, delete mail, spend premium currency.

empty_state.description: Friendly message when list/data is empty, with suggested action
empty_state.spec: Icon + message + optional CTA button. Example: inventory empty -> 'No items yet. Visit the shop to buy some!' with button linking to /game/shop
empty_state.usage: Inventory, mail, quests, achievements, shop (sold out), formation (no units)

loading_state.description: Skeleton or spinner while data loads, never blank flash
loading_state.spec: Use existing <Skeleton /> component. Match shape of content being loaded. Minimum 300ms display to prevent flicker. If loading > 3s, show 'Still loading...' message.

error_state.description: User-friendly error display with retry option
error_state.spec: Show friendly message (not raw API error). Include 'Try Again' button that re-fetches. Log technical error to logger. If persistent after 3 retries, show 'Contact support' message.
error_state.usage: All API data fetches and mutations

phases.current: Implement toast + tooltip + basic form validation across settings and game pages
phases.next: Breadcrumbs on all game pages, empty states on lists, error states on all API calls
